heading: Omitted
label: 60b, 60c Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 60b, acts , ; , , which provided that clerk hire should be at rate of $6,500 per annum and limited individual salaries to $3,900 per annum, was superseded by former .June 20, 1929, ch. 33, § 246 Stat. 38July 25, 1939, ch. 352, § 353 Stat. 1080section 60g of this titleSection 60c, R.S. § 55, related to payment of salaries of chaplains.
